title: system variable max_join_size acts differently when table size is different
poc: create table t1(a int primary key, b int);
key_bug_features: max_join_size inconsistent with varying table sizes
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value DECIMAL(10,2));
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE value > (SELECT AVG(value) FROM t2);
CREATE TABLE t3(x INT, y INT, FOREIGN KEY (x) REFERENCES t2(id));
